calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-24-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Application For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-29-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Lawrence Scancarelli, Esq., appearing with Plaintiff, Matthew Ettinger.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Mary Ahern, SPECIAL ADMINISTRATOR FOR THE ESTATE OF DAVID R. MCCOMBE and Morgan A. McCombe, SPECIAL ADMINISTRATOR FOR THE ESTATE OF DAVID R. MCCOMBE.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 2-10 dismissed without prejudice.

Witness: Matthew Ettinger Sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $253,686.80
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $13,068.00
Costs: $1386.60
Total Judgment in the amount of $268,151.40

Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2015 Continued To Dec-15-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Order To Add/Substitute Successor In Interest Of Defendant And Allow For Application For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-21-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF MATTHEW ETTINGER'S Motion For Order To Add/Substitute Successor In Interest Of Defendant And Allow For Application For Default Judgment is granted pursuant to stipulation. Order to stipulation signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Denise Doucette, CSR No. 5963; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
